creator: Christopher.petrik@usm.edu
text:
Please remove me from this port
I stopped using hiawatha from ports after the mbedtls stupidity in regards to adding mbedtls3.x and allowing for the internal lib.

hacking a program to make it work with an older version instead of adding in a newer port isnt the way to go in my opinion and ive just decided to do some magic with poudriere and use it this way.
